short_rationale: Requires grounding two films, retrieving both directors, and verifying whether they match.
Person-to-father-to-school chain with a kinship bridge.
Dense film title plus director-to-birthplace lookup.
Parenthetical date disambiguates the person; paternal grandfather implies a father-of-father chain.
Dense song title with punctuation; song-to-composer-to-nationality lookup.
Long song title and nested performer-to-father chain.
Parenthetical song alias plus composer-to-cause-of-death chain.
Film alias in parentheses; film-to-director-to-nationality lookup.
Nested phrasing and film alias; film-to-director-to-death-place lookup.
Standard 2-hop song-to-composer-to-birthplace chain; useful but relatively common despite the dense song title.
Adds parenthetical song disambiguation on top of the same 2-hop performer-to-birthplace chain, improving grounding coverage.
